overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-lit cyberpunk urban plaza in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks past the BD SHACK building and circles a central planter with glowing benches, approaching a 24/7 convenience store entrance surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial plaza with central seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the central planter area, passing by the BD SHACK building

entered.detail: multi-story commercial building with large red BD SHACK signage and neon accents
towering glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising in the background
bright blue holographic sign reading 24/7 STORE mounted on the building facade
large tree growing from a raised hexagonal planter in the center of the plaza
futuristic seating with glowing pink and cyan neon strips surrounding the central planter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide cyberpunk plaza at dusk, dominated by neon signage. The BD SHACK building stands prominently on the left while futuristic skyscrapers tower in the background. The camera moves forward toward a central planter with neon-lit benches, with the 24/7 STORE sign visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza area with illuminated seating

agents.ego_description: turning right around the central planter, navigating through the plaza pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright red mohawk and dark clothing walking past the camera from left to right

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right around the central planter, causing the BD SHACK building to exit the frame left. A pedestrian with a distinctive red mohawk passes closely by from left to right. The 24/7 STORE sign remains visible ahead but shifts to center-frame as the camera reorients toward the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building entrance with neon signage

agents.ego_description: approaching the 24/7 store entrance while passing the illuminated planter benches

entered.detail: commercial building exterior with distinctive teal and gray geometric trim and staircases
dark entranceway beneath the 24/7 STORE signage with illuminated door frames

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves steadily forward toward the 24/7 STORE entrance. The teal-trimmed building facade dominates the view as the camera approaches, with the neon store sign growing larger in the frame. The central planter with its glowing benches shifts to the left and begins to exit the field of view as the entrance arch becomes prominent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk plaza that shifts from a wide urban vista to a close-up approach of a convenience store. It begins by moving forward past the BD SHACK building under the glow of towering skyscrapers and distant neon signage. As the camera turns right to circle a central planter with glowing benches, the BD SHACK exits the frame and a pedestrian with a red mohawk crosses the path. The scene then reorients toward the 24/7 STORE, with the neon sign shifting to center-frame as the camera advances. Finally, the view narrows toward the teal-trimmed facade and entrance arch of the store, while the glowing benches slide out of view to the left.
